DEPT. #4 DOROTHY VON BEROLDINGEN, JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. C. GALLAGHER, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: ARNOLD W. EVJE II PLTF'S ATTY. DEFT. IN PRO PER JACOB MONTGOMERY. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION TO ENTER JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACOB THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 6TH STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-19-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR TERMS APPLICABLE TO AN AMENDED MONEY JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED ONLY IF DEFT.
